inputs.label: Annual Electricity Usage
inputs.businessContext: Total electricity consumption in kilowatt-hours per year (indirect emissions from grid).

businessContext_i18n.en: Total electricity consumption in kilowatt-hours per year (indirect emissions from grid).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Yıllık toplam elektrik tüketimi (kilowatt-saat cinsinden, dolaylı emisyonlar).
businessContext_i18n.de: Gesamter Stromverbrauch in Kilowattstunden pro Jahr (indirekte Emissionen aus dem Netz).
businessContext_i18n.fr: Consommation totale d'électricité en kilowattheures par an (émissions indirectes du réseau).
businessContext_i18n.es: Consumo total de electricidad en kilovatios-hora por año (emisiones indirectas de la red).

inputs.label: Annual Natural Gas Usage
inputs.businessContext: Total natural gas usage in therms per year (direct emissions from combustion).

businessContext_i18n.en: Total natural gas usage in therms per year (direct emissions from combustion).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Yıllık toplam doğal gaz tüketimi (term cinsinden, doğrudan yanma emisyonları).
businessContext_i18n.de: Gesamter Erdgasverbrauch in Thermen pro Jahr (direkte Emissionen aus Verbrennung).
businessContext_i18n.fr: Consommation totale de gaz naturel en therms par an (émissions directes de combustion).
businessContext_i18n.es: Consumo total de gas natural en termias por año (emisiones directas por combustión).

inputs.label: Annual Vehicle Miles
inputs.businessContext: Total miles driven per year in gasoline-powered vehicles (scope 1 mobile combustion).

businessContext_i18n.en: Total miles driven per year in gasoline-powered vehicles (scope 1 mobile combustion).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Benzinli araçlarla yılda kat edilen toplam mil (kapsam 1 mobil yanma).
businessContext_i18n.de: Gesamte Kilometer pro Jahr mit benzinbetriebenen Fahrzeugen (Scope-1-Mobile-Verbrennung).
businessContext_i18n.fr: Nombre total de miles parcourus par an avec des véhicules à essence (combustion mobile scope 1).
businessContext_i18n.es: Millas totales recorridas por año en vehículos de gasolina (combustión móvil alcance 1).

inputs.label: Annual Flight Miles
inputs.businessContext: Total miles flown per year (average short/medium-haul flights, scope 3 upstream).

businessContext_i18n.en: Total miles flown per year (average short/medium-haul flights, scope 3 upstream).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Yılda uçulan toplam mil (ortalama kısa/orta mesafeli uçuşlar, kapsam 3 yukarı akış).
businessContext_i18n.de: Gesamte Flugkilometer pro Jahr (durchschnittliche Kurz-/Mittelstreckenflüge, Scope-3-Upstream).
businessContext_i18n.fr: Nombre total de miles parcourus par an (vols court/moyen-courrier moyens, scope 3 amont).
businessContext_i18n.es: Millas totales voladas por año (vuelos promedio de corta/media distancia, alcance 3 aguas arriba).

inputs.label: Annual Waste Generation
inputs.businessContext: Total waste sent to landfill per year in pounds (methane emissions from decomposition).

businessContext_i18n.en: Total waste sent to landfill per year in pounds (methane emissions from decomposition).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Yılda depolama sahasına gönderilen toplam atık miktarı pound cinsinden (çürümeden kaynaklanan metan emisyonları).
businessContext_i18n.de: Gesamter Abfall, der pro Jahr auf Deponien entsorgt wird, in Pfund (Methanemissionen aus Zersetzung).
businessContext_i18n.fr: Déchets totaux envoyés à la décharge par an en livres (émissions de méthane liées à la décomposition).
businessContext_i18n.es: Residuos totales enviados al vertedero por año en libras (emisiones de metano por descomposición).

inputs.label: Annual Water Usage
inputs.businessContext: Total water consumption in gallons per year (energy for treatment and pumping).

businessContext_i18n.en: Total water consumption in gallons per year (energy for treatment and pumping).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Yıllık toplam su tüketimi galon cinsinden (arıtma ve pompalama için enerji).
businessContext_i18n.de: Gesamter Wasserverbrauch in Gallonen pro Jahr (Energie für Aufbereitung und Pumpen).
businessContext_i18n.fr: Consommation totale d'eau en gallons par an (énergie pour le traitement et le pompage).
businessContext_i18n.es: Consumo total de agua en galones por año (energía para tratamiento y bombeo).

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
